# Vedlik Website Content Snapshot

Vedlik is an AI and technology intelligence platform built to reduce information noise and surface high-signal updates quickly. It delivers the latest AI updates, tech news, startup funding rounds, and machine learning breakthroughs in concise, source-backed briefs. Designed for developers, founders, students, and curious professionals who want to stay current on artificial intelligence and tech industry trends.

## Primary Topic Coverage

- **AI Updates**: Latest releases, model updates, and breakthroughs from OpenAI (ChatGPT, GPT-4o), Google DeepMind (Gemini), Anthropic (Claude), Meta AI (Llama), Mistral, and the broader AI ecosystem.
- **Tech News Today**: Breaking technology news with context, source attribution, and clear takeaways.
- **Startup Funding**: Venture capital rounds, seed funding, Series A/B/C, M&A activity, and startup launches.
- **Machine Learning**: Model releases, benchmark results, research papers, and technical implications.
- **Generative AI**: Image generation, video AI, audio AI, code generation, and LLM-powered products.
- **Technology Policy**: AI regulation, government policy, safety standards, and industry governance.
- **Developer Intelligence**: API changes, platform updates, pricing shifts, and breaking changes.
- **Technology Trends**: Emerging categories, market shifts, and what's next in tech.

## Key Public Pages

1. Home (`https://vedlik.com/`)
   - Product positioning: AI updates, tech news, and startup intelligence.
   - Core feature summaries including the dual-view "Signals" reading experience.
   - Waitlist download CTAs for iOS and Android.

2. Privacy Policy (`https://vedlik.com/privacy-policy`)
   - What data may be collected.
   - Data usage, sharing, retention, and security controls.
   - User rights and deletion pathways.

3. Terms and Conditions (`https://vedlik.com/terms-and-conditions`)
   - Legal terms for app usage.
   - Intellectual property and user obligations.
   - Liability disclaimers and governing law.

4. Data Deletion Request (`https://vedlik.com/data-deletion-request`)
   - In-app and email-based deletion process.
   - Processing timeline and verification expectations.

## Key Features

- **Concise Briefs**: Each story distilled to what changed, why it matters, and what to do next.
- **Source Attribution**: Every brief links back to original reporting so you can verify.
- **Signals View**: Flip any story to see structured technical signals, entity extraction, and deeper context.
- **No Clickbait**: Facts before opinions, built for daily decisions.
- **Free to Use**: Core experience is free — no subscription required.

## Target Audience

- Software developers and engineers tracking AI APIs, model changes, and developer tools
- Startup founders and investors following funding rounds and market trends
- Students and recent graduates learning AI concepts for interviews and projects
- Tech professionals, operators, and product managers staying current

## Contact
- support@vedlik.com
